title: [TruthTable][Synth] Add precomputed 4-input NPN lookup table
body:
Introduce `NPNTable`, a precomputed lookup table for 4-input single-output
truth tables, plus utilities to enumerate the 222 canonical NPN
representatives.

It's very common to compute canonical (!= semi-canonical) NPN for 4-input since 
there are only 222 classes and entire mapping can be stored in 0.5 MB. 
This is preparation commit for implementing 4-input NPN cut rewriting (close to ABC's 
rewrite, and mockturtle's rewrite). 

AI-assited-by: GPT-5.4
